input_candidates.truth_value: AN850-T: YS 991 MPa, UTS 1269 MPa, elongation 13.9%.

input_candidates.truth_value: No dynamic propagation instabilities (Lüders bands or Portevin-Le Chatelier bands) were observed in any sample.
input_candidates.prediction_value: Fracture analysis (Fig. 11): microvoids nucleate mainly at soft-hard domain interfaces; AN750-T and AN800-T show crack tip blunting and secondary cracks at hard domain interfaces, while AN850-T exhibits severed hard domains due to local alloying element oversaturation; dimple size distribution is bimodal with AN750-T having the largest average dimple size.

input_candidates.truth_value: The yield strength of the developed multiphase steel is 2-3 times higher than traditional low-alloy steel.
